span.p:
Return empty string
(no insights to inject)

div.style: color: rgb(255, 255, 255) !important; display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
Filter by relevance:
1. Intent match
2. Topic word overlap
3. Fallback: most recent

div.style: color: rgb(255, 255, 255) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Format top 3 as:
'Learnings from past interactions:
- insight summary 1
- insight summary 2
- insight summary 3'

div.style: color: rgb(255, 255, 255) !important; display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
Inject into ReACT
system prompt via
{reflexion_context} placeholder

LLM Self-Reflect
System: 'You are a
self-reflection agent'
temp=0.2, max_tokens=512

span.p:
StoreEpisodicMemory
event_type: reflexion_insight
summary: the improvement text
key_topics: for future matching
metadata: scores + failure reason
